subsidyType: city-managed phased replacement program backed by state grant and loan funding
publicSideCovered: yes the city manages replacement work in the public system
privateSideCovered: yes participating customers pay no additional fees when they join the city program
propertyRules: service lines requiring replacement are identified through the inventory and phase areas and owners must sign a right-of-entry form
contractorRules: city-selected contractors perform potholing verification replacement and follow-up testing
